title: Ability to save different columns order per view.
excerpt:
Currently the order of columns in board views is the same & you just manage the views by hiding columns for items & subitems. 
It would have been great to have an option to arrange columns in different order for each vie…

posts.author: alexross (Alex Ross)
posts.cookedHtml:
Currently the order of columns in board views is the same & you just manage the views by hiding columns for items & subitems.

It would have been great to have an option to arrange columns in different order for each view.
